steps.title: Recognize the multiplier
steps.content:
Each increase of $1$ in $x$ multiplies $y$ by $3$, so the model has the form
$$y=a(3)^x$$

steps.title: Use the initial value
steps.content:
When $x=0$, the value of $y$ is $150$.
$$150=a(3)^0$$
$$150=a$$
So the equation is $y=150(3)^x$. The answer is D.
